lanes.name: Receipt-bound internal result
lanes.description: Executable or enumerated result with named verifier/receipt inside the corpus.

lanes.name: Standard theorem / citation-bound result
lanes.description: Result imported from established mathematics, physics, CS, or formal methods.

lanes.name: CAM/crystal reapplication result
lanes.description: Result obtained by applying Claude/Kimi/MannyAI CAM, crystal, node, or window data.

lanes.name: Normal-form result
lanes.description: Result expressed through LCR/J3(O)/Rule30/algebraic/canonical normal form.

lanes.name: Ledger action
lanes.description: Obligation-ledger import, export, propagation, or reachability row that changes claim posture only through an explicit validator receipt.

lanes.name: External calibration result
lanes.description: Claim requiring measured data, benchmark data, lab result, PDG/material/PDB source, or external comparator.

lanes.name: Grand synthesis claim
lanes.description: Cross-paper unification claim depending on multiple prior lanes and explicit dependencies.

lanes.name: Falsifier / open obligation
lanes.description: Explicit limitation, counterexample, missing proof, missing data, or required next test.
